Primary Summary

Extractive TextRank summary over text-bearing primary records observed in the lookback window

v2/summary_for_recent
Summarising…
How it works: Every primary record observed in the chosen window is examined; numeric measurements (data is a bare number, or data["value"] is a number) are skipped. The remaining text bodies — taken from data["value"] first, falling back to data["raw"] — are ranked by TextRank, and the highest-ranked ones are joined into a single summary.
Loading summary…
